Operation 'createApproval' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. The current summary and description are identical and extremely vague, providing no actionable information for AI agents. The description lacks critical details about: (1) what an approval item is in the context of release management, (2) what inputs are expected beyond the generic schema reference, (3) what the operation returns, (4) what side effects occur (workflow state changes). The improved version clarifies the domain context (release workflow), explains the purpose, references the input schema more meaningfully, specifies the return value, and documents the state change side effect. This enables AI agents to better understand when and how to use this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new approval item for an app release
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new approval item for the specified app. This operation allows you to add an approval checkpoint to a release workflow. The request body should contain the approval item details (such as name and description) as defined in CreateChecklistItemRequest. Returns the created approval item with its assigned ID and metadata. This operation modifies the app's approval workflow state.
